name: Concepts in Healthcare as Applied to Simulation
description: Information regarding the foundational healthcare concepts related to simulation.
keyKsa: Identifying presentation of medical conditions, medication practices, and healthcare professional roles.

name: Simulation Technology Operations
description: Operating networks, A/V, software, and simulation modalities securely and effectively.
keyKsa: Networks, hardware, AV, VR/AR, problem solving, configuration, and maintenance.

name: Healthcare Simulation Practices, Principles, and Procedures
description: Standardized practices, training, resource utilization, safety, and schedules.
keyKsa: Preparation, moulage, fidelity, debriefing, confidentiality, and risk management.

name: Professional Role: Behavior, Capabilities, and Leadership
description: Teamwork, communication, advocacy, ethics, and professional development.
keyKsa: Interprofessional communication, teamwork, advocacy, and ethics.

name: Concepts in Instructional Design as Applied to Simulation
description: Objectives, cognitive levels, assessment methods, and instructional design principles.
keyKsa: Learning objectives, Bloom's taxonomy, assessment, evaluation, feedback.
